zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏多延续但动能趋缓
zh.content:
当前Solana美元整体维持震荡偏多结构，价格站稳69关口上方，短线波动极窄，但仍运行于20日均线之上，说明中期趋势未破坏，多头结构仍占优势  

MACD略微为负且信号线未完全给出，短期动能偏弱但未形成明显死叉，结合价格贴近高位整理，市场进入多空拉锯阶段，方向等待进一步确认略  

下方初步支撑位于67.5附近，对应20日均线区域，上方短线阻力集中在70.2至71区间，若放量突破则有望延续上行，否则仍以区间震荡为主  

操作上建议以回踩低吸为主，关注67.5支撑有效性，未跌破前可轻仓分批布局，多单目标看向70上方，若跌破支撑则应及时止损观望为宜策略

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana (SOL/USD) is currently trading in a tight consolidation phase around 69.36, reflecting a lack of strong directional conviction. Price action remains compressed between 69.13 and 69.48, indicating short-term equilibrium after recent volatility. Despite the flat 24-hour change, the market maintains a mildly bullish structure as price holds above the 20-period SMA at 67.76, suggesting underlying demand is still intact.

Momentum indicators show a neutral-to-slightly bearish short-term tone, as MACD sits marginally below zero at -0.0133. However, the absence of a defined signal line reading limits confirmation of downside momentum. The lack of RSI data reduces oscillator clarity, but price stability above the SMA(20) indicates buyers are still defending key dynamic support, preventing deeper corrective pressure from developing at this stage.

Immediate resistance is located near 69.48, with a psychological extension toward 70.00 likely to act as the next upside barrier if momentum improves. On the downside, initial support sits at 69.13, followed closely by the 67.76 SMA(20), which remains the key dynamic support zone. A break below this moving average would signal weakening structure and open room toward lower support near 66.50.

Given the current compression, traders may favor range-bound strategies, buying near support and taking profits into upper resistance. Breakout traders should monitor a decisive move above 69.50–70.00 for confirmation of renewed bullish momentum, potentially targeting 72–75 in extension. Conversely, failure to hold 67.76 would invalidate the short-term bullish bias and increase risk of a deeper retracement phase.
